summary: Executed targeted backend and frontend regression testing for Google first-time onboarding gating, multi-step onboarding UX, onboarding completion persistence, and auth/settings post-onboarding flows.

integration_issues.issue: Completed users can still open and stay on onboarding page by navigating directly to /welcome, instead of being redirected to /home.

action_items: Update /app/frontend/src/App.js route guard for /welcome so authenticated users with onboarding_completed=true are redirected to /home.
Retest both paths after fix: (1) normal post-onboarding login should land on dashboard/home, (2) direct /welcome navigation should redirect away for completed users.
critical_code_review_comments: Routing gap: /welcome route currently renders OnboardingPage for any authenticated user, independent of onboarding_completed state, causing completed users to re-enter onboarding via direct URL.
backend/server.py remains oversized (>700 lines), increasing maintenance and regression risk despite passing tested onboarding/auth flows.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST host/member communities through public APIs and seeded one UI test account as auth_provider=google with onboarding_completed=false via Mongo update for onboarding-gating validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend onboarding coverage now exists in /app/backend/tests/test_google_onboarding_flow.py (4/4 pass). Playwright validated: login for Google-pending user redirects to /welcome, multi-step onboarding with recommendations renders, completion creates starter resources and lands on /home, subsequent login does not auto-route to /welcome, settings profile save remains functional. Remaining issue: direct /welcome access still allowed after onboarding completion.
rca of the issue: RCA: In /app/frontend/src/App.js, the explicit '/welcome' route renders <OnboardingPage ...> whenever session?.token is truthy. This bypasses ProtectedApp redirect logic for completed users because '/welcome' is outside the catch-all protected route. Reproduction: complete onboarding, then navigate directly to /welcome; onboarding screen appears and user remains there. Mitigation: make '/welcome' route conditional on (session.user.auth_provider === 'google' && !session.user.onboarding_completed), otherwise Navigate to '/home'.
